/CAL:REAPPOINTMENT OF ALIENIST IN PLACE OF DR, BARRON,/NP/X:MATTER WAS  ADDED TO CALENDAR BECAUSE DR, BARRON CONTACTED CLERK TO INDICATE THAT HE COULD NOT ACCEPT APPOINTMENT, HOWEVER, DEFENSE COUNSEL NOTIFIED THE COURT TODAY THAT DR, BARRON CONTACTED HIM MOST RECENTLY TO INDICATE THAT HE COULD ACCEPT APPOINTMENT,/X:THE 07-21-21 DATE IS VACATED AND HE MATTER IS CONTINUEDTO 08-04-21 TO ALLOW TIME FOR EVALUATION TO BE COMPLETED,/CONTD:PC 1369 REPORTS FROM DR, BARRON AND DR, GOOD/DRSB/DEPT 14:08-04-21/
